blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,205 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 26".
